_purpose: Acknowledgment ledger so governance_audit.py can distinguish unresolved review burden from already-absorbed work. Status options: ACKNOWLEDGED, VERIFIED_CLEAN, SUPERSEDED, DEFERRED_UNTIL_DATE.

_discount_rules.DEFERRED_UNTIL_DATE: weight * 0.2 before due date; weight * 1.0 if past due and not yet resolved
